parameters.query:
select
  id as daily_log_id,
  log_date,
  morning_weight_kg
from daily_logs
where user_id = '8fa91239-dc4b-47cb-8ef2-a8c2a9422bea'
order by log_date asc;

select
  mi.daily_log_id,
  dl.log_date,
  mi.meal_type,
  mi.food_name,
  mi.grams,
  mi.calories,
  mi.protein_g,
  mi.carbs_g,
  mi.fat_g
from meal_items mi
join daily_logs dl
  on dl.id = mi.daily_log_id
where dl.user_id = '8fa91239-dc4b-47cb-8ef2-a8c2a9422bea'
order by dl.log_date asc;

select
  dl.log_date,
  sum(mi.calories) as total_calories,
  sum(mi.protein_g) as total_protein,
  sum(mi.carbs_g) as total_carbs,
  sum(mi.fat_g) as total_fat
from meal_items mi
join daily_logs dl
  on dl.id = mi.daily_log_id
where dl.user_id = '8fa91239-dc4b-47cb-8ef2-a8c2a9422bea'
group by dl.log_date
order by dl.log_date asc;
